hero.subtitle: Full access to the complete framework on every plan. The only difference is how long you commit — and how much you pay per month as a result.
title: Pricing
subtitle: All plans include the same strategy, the same signal logic, and the same risk framework. Longer commitments cost less per month. That's the only distinction.

prices.subtitle: Try it, test it, evaluate it

trust.title: Clean Billing. No Surprises.
trust.subtitle: Every financial detail of the subscription is visible upfront. What you see at checkout is what you pay — nothing added later.

trust.items.title: Processed by Whop
trust.items.description: Checkout, billing, and subscription management are handled entirely by Whop Inc. as Merchant of Record. Your payment details never touch our servers.

trust.items.title: No Performance Fees
trust.items.description: The subscription is a flat fee. We don't take a cut of your profits, charge per trade, or add fees based on account size. Ever.

trust.items.title: Cancel From Your Dashboard
trust.items.description: Manage, pause, or cancel your subscription at any time directly through your Whop member dashboard — no emails to send, no requests to approve.

trust.items.title: Access Within Minutes
trust.items.description: After payment, your TradingView account is authorized automatically. The strategy is in your Invite-Only Scripts folder and ready to apply to a chart.

steps.title: From checkout to live chart in under ten minutes.

steps.items.title: Step 1: Choose Your Plan
steps.items.description: Monthly for flexibility, quarterly or annual if you're committing to the process. All plans start with the same 7-day free trial.

steps.items.title: Step 2: Enter Your TradingView Username
steps.items.description: During checkout, you'll be asked for your exact TradingView username. This is how access is linked to your account — so get the spelling right. Note: a TradingView paid plan (Essential or higher) is required for reliable alert delivery. The free plan has alert limitations that can affect strategy performance.

steps.items.title: Step 3: Complete Payment via Whop
steps.items.description: Checkout is handled securely by Whop. Card details go directly to their infrastructure — not to us.

steps.items.title: Step 4: Automatic Authorization
steps.items.description: The moment payment clears, your TradingView username is authorized for the private script. No manual steps on our end required.

steps.items.title: Step 5: Apply to Your Chart
steps.items.description: Open TradingView, find the strategy under Invite-Only Scripts in the Indicators menu, and apply it to a Bitcoin chart. Set your preferred timeframe and risk parameters. Requires TradingView Essential plan or higher for full functionality — the free plan does not support the number of active alerts needed for consistent execution.

steps.items.title: Step 6: Connect to Your Exchange (Optional)
steps.items.description: For fully automated execution, connect the strategy to your exchange via TradingView webhooks. The setup guide walks through the exact steps.

faq.title: Common Questions Before Buying
cta.title: Seven Days Free. No Commitment.
cta.subtitle: Apply the strategy to a live chart, observe the signals in real market conditions, and evaluate it yourself before paying anything.
steps.subtitle: What you'll need before starting: a TradingView account on the Essential plan or higher, your exact TradingView username, and a Bitget account if you want automated execution (optional).
